page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single integrated NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU equipped with 8 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage and relies on network-attached storage, operating with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the underlying Intel Broadwell-generation CPU delivers modest processing capabilities. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance falls in the bottom 10%, while multi-core performance is categorized in the bottom 25%. Similarly, PassMark CPU extended instructions, encryption, and physics tests rank in the bottom 25%, though the overall PassMark CPU score reaches the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is average, but large-block read and write operations, along with PassMark memory scores, fall into the bottom 25%. Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput also register in the bottom 25% tier.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is its reliance on older hardware architectures, specifically the Intel Xeon E5 v4 CPU and NVIDIA Pascal GPU, which results in lower computational efficiency compared to modern alternatives. However, this older hardware profile offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads that do not require high-end tensor cores or massive memory bandwidth. Lacking local storage, it is best configured for workloads that utilize network storage. This instance is suitable for entry-level GPU tasks, basic machine learning inference, video transcoding, and general-purpose workloads requiring modest parallel processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor with 8 dedicated vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the KVM hypervisor, this server does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark results place its single-core and multi-core CPU performance in the lower tiers, with stress-ng and PassMark metrics generally ranking in the bottom 25%. However, its small-block cached memory bandwidth remains average. Given the older Pascal GPU and Broadwell CPU architecture, this instance represents a budget-friendly option for entry-level GPU acceleration. It is best suited for workloads such as basic machine learning inference, video transcoding, and general-purpose tasks requiring moderate parallel processing without demanding high-end compute performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, designed for entry-level parallel processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a KVM-based instance with 8 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU for entry-level GPU workloads.
tagline: An entry-level GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and an NVIDIA Pascal GPU for budget-conscious parallel computing workloads.

NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage configurations
Suited for entry-level machine learning inference and video transcoding
